full_text:
The sample was minced into small pieces and dissociated with: 9,7 ml DMEM/F12+++ (DMEM/F12 supplemented with 1X glutamax, 10 mM HEPES, and 1% pen/strep) + 200 µl Dispase + 100µl DNAse. Incubated at 37C rotating for 30 min, vortexed before and after. Filtered through 70 µm cell strainer, and RBC lysis with 2 ml for 5 min + 15 ml DMEM/F12+++. After RBC lysis and centrifugation, the final pellet was resuspended in 4 ml of media, and counted.

Cell counts:

Biobanking

4 cryovials of 5.62 E6 cells each were frozen in 1mL of STEM-CellBanker.
